prestazioni: B58B30M0 engine (3.0L inline-6) upgraded with a Pure Stage 2 turbo kit featuring a Garrett GTX3582R Gen II turbocharger, custom 4-inch titanium downpipe with Tial 44mm external wastegate, and CSF intercooler with 1000hp core capacity for sustained drift loads

Dorst Engineering custom ECU tune with MHD Flasher Stage 2+ aggressive drift mapping, including launch control at 5500 RPM, flat-foot shifting, and overboost protection for 1.5-bar peak pressure under lateral load

Full Driftworks Motorsport drift-spec suspension setup: Ohlins Road & Track coilovers with 8kg/mm front and 10kg/mm rear springs, custom rear subframe reinforcement plates, and Wisefab front upper control arms with spherical bearings for 50-degree steering angle
estetica: Liberty Walk LB-WORKS Z4-specific widebody kit with carbon fiber front fenders, rear quarter panels, and custom 3D-printed rear diffuser for aggressive stance and downforce at drift angles
Custom livery by Fatlace Graphics featuring a hand-painted 'Drift Tax' theme with gold leaf accents, matte black vinyl wrap with gloss red pinstripes, and carbon fiber mirror caps from 3D Carbon

Rear wing from Seibon Carbon with a custom dual-element design, adjustable angle for downforce tuning, and integrated LED brake light for drift events, paired with a custom front splitter from Varis Japan with integrated canards
